svg.title: Three Starter Stations — Conveyor Bus Style
svg.text: Ring 1: Dock + Relay + Furnace | Ring 2: Ore Silo
Small. Smelts ferrite. First station new players visit.
Ring 1: Dock + Relay + Silo | Ring 2: Press + LaserFab + TractorFab + Shipyard
Fabrication hub. Builds frames, modules, scaffolds.
Ring 1-3: Full smelting + fab. The big station.
Advanced smelting. Copper and crystal. Three rings.

g.text: full pipeline: ore → Cu/Cr ingots → lasers, tractors
